title: Aesthetic Frames
description: This mod adds decorative timber and stone frames for all vanilla woods and most stones, including modded materials for expanded palette and creativity.
body:
**Aesthetic Frames** is a decorative building mod that brings elegant, customizable timber and stone frames to Minecraft! Whether you're designing a cozy cabin, a rustic farmhouse, or a grand medieval structure, these versatile framing blocks give your builds the detail and contrast they’ve been missing.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d05004794cb24cf189d85a891cc46786bf3f972.png)

## Features
### Framing Blocks for All Vanilla Wood Types
Use oak, birch, spruce, jungle, acacia, dark oak, mangrove, cherry, bamboo, and more to create richly textured timber frames.

### Stone Frame Variants
Most vanilla stone materials — including stone bricks, sandstone, deepslate, blackstone, and others — get their own frame versions. Perfect for sturdy walls, gothic architecture, or fortress-style accents.

### Multiple Frame Types
From thick beams to cross-braced panels and decorative diagonals, mix and match frame shapes for unique combinations and aesthetics.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edc094db293c6af74bf0f6e87697bb6c55a8e078.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/789b5c63f37d328a6ebb067b10dc76a8a6a2e525_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bd334bae275b19643467ab6c1035dedea8bef13_0.webp)

### Mod Integration: Arboreal Nature & Wild Fields
If you use Arboreal Nature or Wild Fields, you’ll unlock additional wood types, regional stone textures, and a broader palette of frame options. These mods add biome diversity — and Aesthetic Frames complements them beautifully.

### Survival-Friendly Crafting Recipes
All frames are accessible in survival mode with intuitive recipes — fully integrated into the vanilla progression system.
